name: pjl-land-services
description: PJL Land Services public site, lead intake, and CRM. Static pages + Node backend.

scripts.build: node build.js && node scripts/sync-prices-html.mjs && node scripts/sync-meta-prices.mjs && node worker/rebuild.mjs
scripts.build:check: node build.js --check && node scripts/sync-meta-prices.mjs --check && node scripts/lint-no-hardcoded-prices.mjs && node scripts/test-pricing.mjs
